top_signals.title: New Zealand Inflation Accelerates to 4.1% as Fuel Costs Soar
top_signals.summary: New Zealand’s annual inflation accelerated to the fastest pace in more than two years in the second quarter, fanned by soaring fuel prices and reinforcing the Reserve Bank’s decision to begin raising interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Trump hits Canadian imports with new 50% tariffs, escalating trade fight
top_signals.summary:
President Donald Trump on Monday announced sweeping new 50% tariffs on roughly $20 billion worth of Canadian imports.

The post Trump hits Canadian imports with new 50% tariffs, escalating trade fight  appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
